title: Balloon Clear Drop Bag (25cm x 26cm) 1 Count - Party Accessory, Perfect for Any Celebration, Blue, 80" x 36"
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ELEVANT YOUR CELEBRATION: Make your event stand out with our balloon clear drop bag; a unique and exciting party accessory guaranteed to bring joy and entertainment to any celebration.

PERFECTLY SIZED & TRANSPARENT: Measuring 25cm x 26cm, our clear balloon drop bag offers ample space for a fun-filled effect, while allowing guests to anticipate the thrilling moment when balloons cascade down.

VERSATILE & EASY TO USE: Designed for any occasion, from birthdays and weddings to baby showers and corporate events, our 1-count balloon drop bag is simple to set up and perfect for making memories that last.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Constructed with durable plastic, our balloon drop bag ensures a reliable performance and is strong enough to hold a multitude of balloons for your big event.
CREATE UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS: Opt for balloon clear drop bag as your go-to party accessory and add an element of surprise and excitement to your celebration, making it the talk of the town.
description: Product Description Surprise! Hang this Balloon Drop Bag on high and pull the rip cord at just the right moment to release a colorful shower of balloons, streamers, tissue paper, and other floating decorations. Use the included support piece to attach the clear plastic Drop Bag to the ceiling, and fill it with the right mix of latex and foil balloons to match your party theme. The Drop Bag needs only 3ft of overhead clearance, but comes with an adjustable 10ft rip cord. Birthdays, baby showers, pep rallies, and New Year's Eve parties become all the more fun as guests eagerly anticipate the moment of the big drop! Balloon Drop Bag holds up to 100 standard size latex balloons. Safety Warning Warning: To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this plastic bag away from babies and children. Do not use in cribs, beds, carriages or playpens. This bag is not a toy. Box Contains 1 x BALLOON DROP BAG See more
